title: 拜燈上台後澳洲縮沙，港人在澳洲5年臨時簽證屆滿後，只可以申請技術簽證

replies.msg:
莫理遜表示，獲延長臨時簽證的港人，在具備「適當技術」下可申請一款技術永居簽證
移民部發言人解釋，不會為港人專設一項新簽證，而是讓他們優待條件申請「現有」的永居簽證
有港人表示，澳洲政府遲遲未公佈永居簽證政策，令她對前路感到不明確

https://www.sbs.com.au/language/cantonese/zh-hant/audio/hong-kongers-need-to-have-the-appropriate-skills-for-a-skilled-visa-after-5-year-temporary-visa-period-says-morrison

不過呢班撚樣好似有美國籍

對港人黎講 最穩陣只係得英國
加/澳 政府換閣隨時改變移民政策
玩死去到當地的港人

工黨影子內政部長簡納莉（Kristina Keneally）批評，莫理遜政府顯然沒有兌現去年許下的承諾。

「在澳洲和香港，仍有數以千計的人士，要不是不合資格使用莫理遜承諾給予的（移民）途徑，就是擔心他們無法與家人團聚。」

「莫理遜必須向香港人和他們的澳洲家人和朋友表明，他是否繼續兌現其承諾，的的確確給予港人移民途徑來澳洲。」

「移民部長已經有權力在緊急情況下提供簽證途徑，意味莫理遜和霍克是惟一的兩個人阻止港人與澳洲家人團聚。」

replies.msg:
International graduates studying in a regional area
Temporary Graduate visa (TGV) holders (post-study work stream) who have graduated from a regional educational institution and have lived in regional Australia on their first TGV are eligible for a second TGV.

Those eligible for a second TGV are required to remain in a regional area for the duration of their new visa.

Eligibility includes international students who studied at a regional campus of a metropolitan university.

International graduates who have studied and lived in Category 2 may be eligible for an additional year on a second Temporary Graduate visa.
International graduates who have studied and lived in Category 3 may be eligible for an additional 2 years on a second Temporary Graduate visa.

Eligible regional areas
The regional definition is comprised of the following 3 categories:

Category 1 – ‘Major Cities’ of Sydney, Melbourne and Brisbane do not receive any regional incentives
Category 2 – ‘Cities and Major Regional Centres’ of Perth, Adelaide, the Gold Coast, the Sunshine Coast, Canberra, Newcastle/Lake Macquarie, Wollongong/Illawarra, Geelong and Hobart
Category 3 – ‘Regional Centres and Other Regional Areas’
https://immi.homeaffairs.gov.au/visas/working-in-australia/regional-migration

例如呢？

International graduates studying in a regional area
Temporary Graduate visa (TGV) holders (post-study work stream) who have graduated from a regional educational institution and have lived in regional Australia on their first TGV are eligible for a second TGV.

Those eligible for a second TGV are required to remain in a regional area for the duration of their new visa.

Eligibility includes international students who studied at a regional campus of a metropolitan university.

International graduates who have studied and lived in Category 2 may be eligible for an additional year on a second Temporary Graduate visa.
International graduates who have studied and lived in Category 3 may be eligible for an additional 2 years on a second Temporary Graduate visa.

Eligible regional areas
The regional definition is comprised of the following 3 categories:

Category 1 – ‘Major Cities’ of Sydney, Melbourne and Brisbane do not receive any regional incentives
Category 2 – ‘Cities and Major Regional Centres’ of Perth, Adelaide, the Gold Coast, the Sunshine Coast, Canberra, Newcastle/Lake Macquarie, Wollongong/Illawarra, Geelong and Hobart
Category 3 – ‘Regional Centres and Other Regional Areas’
https://immi.homeaffairs.gov.au/visas/working-in-australia/regional-migration

quote.msg: 例如呢？

International graduates studying in a regional area
Temporary Graduate visa (TGV) holders (post-study work stream) who have graduated from a regional educational institution and have lived in regional Australia on their first TGV are eligible for a second TGV.

Those eligible for a second TGV are required to remain in a regional area for the duration of their new visa.

Eligibility includes international students who studied at a regional campus of a metropolitan university.

International graduates who have studied and lived in Category 2 may be eligible for an additional year on a second Temporary Graduate visa.
International graduates who have studied and lived in Category 3 may be eligible for an additional 2 years on a second Temporary Graduate visa.

Eligible regional areas
The regional definition is comprised of the following 3 categories:

Category 1 – ‘Major Cities’ of Sydney, Melbourne and Brisbane do not receive any regional incentives
Category 2 – ‘Cities and Major Regional Centres’ of Perth, Adelaide, the Gold Coast, the Sunshine Coast, Canberra, Newcastle/Lake Macquarie, Wollongong/Illawarra, Geelong and Hobart
Category 3 – ‘Regional Centres and Other Regional Areas’
https://immi.homeaffairs.gov.au/visas/working-in-australia/regional-migration

replies.msg:
你同佢既睇法最大既分別在於
你認為澳洲政府唔應該係港人政策反口
佢就覺得就算反口都好，有幫已經好好
一開始著眼點唔同無得討論
不過如果因為屌澳洲反口就係反化就太武斷

其實依家擺到明係澳洲反口，之前有講過有特別通道而家又冇。你睇個政策就會知道啦 佢之前本身都唔係預計俾香港人儲分移民

如果係俾香港人用現有途徑儲分移民嘅話 點會偏遠地區得三年 城市地區五年 咁咪即係叫啲人唔好去偏遠地區讀書 五年儲嘅分點都多過三年啦。所以之前應該係住夠就會有pr.

至於見到樓上有人用捐錢來做例子 更加唔明 雖然幫人係佢哋自己決定幫唔幫 但係如果你一開始應承咗幫而導致啲人有進一步嘅行動嘅話 之後又同人講冇 就唔係咁好囉。就好似應承捐一億買書俾非洲兒童 之後慈善機構俾咗錢訂一億書 最後條友只係捐二千萬

而家澳洲讀書學費都十幾至二十幾萬港紙一年，未計生活費 可能一個三年嘅大學學位連埋生活 要100至150萬 其實有少少似水左啲人過去讀書 仲要水啲人去偏遠地區添

quote.msg:
其實依家擺到明係澳洲反口，之前有講過有特別通道而家又冇。你睇個政策就會知道啦 佢之前本身都唔係預計俾香港人儲分移民

如果係俾香港人用現有途徑儲分移民嘅話 點會偏遠地區得三年 城市地區五年 咁咪即係叫啲人唔好去偏遠地區讀書 五年儲嘅分點都多過三年啦。所以之前應該係住夠就會有pr.

至於見到樓上有人用捐錢來做例子 更加唔明 雖然幫人係佢哋自己決定幫唔幫 但係如果你一開始應承咗幫而導致啲人有進一步嘅行動嘅話 之後又同人講冇 就唔係咁好囉。就好似應承捐一億買書俾非洲兒童 之後慈善機構俾咗錢訂一億書 最後條友只係捐二千萬

而家澳洲讀書學費都十幾至二十幾萬港紙一年，未計生活費 可能一個三年嘅大學學位連埋生活 要100至150萬 其實有少少似水左啲人過去讀書 仲要水啲人去偏遠地區添

如果係俾香港人用現有途徑儲分移民嘅話 點會偏遠地區得三年 城市地區五年 咁咪即係叫啲人唔好去偏遠地區讀書 五年儲嘅分點都多過三年啦。所以之前應該係住夠就會有pr.

至於見到樓上有人用捐錢來做例子 更加唔明 雖然幫人係佢哋自己決定幫唔幫 但係如果你一開始應承咗幫而導致啲人有進一步嘅行動嘅話 之後又同人講冇 就唔係咁好囉。就好似應承捐一億買書俾非洲兒童 之後慈善機構俾咗錢訂一億書 最後條友只係捐二千萬

而家澳洲讀書學費都十幾至二十幾萬港紙一年，未計生活費 可能一個三年嘅大學學位連埋生活 要100至150萬 其實有少少似水左啲人過去讀書 仲要水啲人去偏遠地區添
